result.stdout:
Groom Package References in Azure DevOps
=====================================
Supports configuration via --config path/to/config.json with named feeds and PAT authentication.

Usage:
  NuGroom --config settings.json
  NuGroom -o https://dev.azure.com/org -t token --feed https://feed/index.json --feed-auth "FeedName||pat"

Options:
  --config <path>              Load configuration from JSON file
  -o, --organization <url>     Azure DevOps organization URL
  -t, --token <pat>            Personal Access Token
  -p, --project <name>         Project name (optional, scans all projects if not specified)
  -m, --max-repos <number>     Maximum number of repositories to scan (default: 100)
  -a, --include-archived       Include archived repositories
  --resolve-nuget              Resolve NuGet package information (default: true)
  --skip-nuget                 Skip NuGet package resolution
  --include-packages-config    Include legacy packages.config references in scan
  -d, --detailed               Show detailed package information
  --debug                      Enable debug logging (automatically enabled when debugger attached)
  --feed <url>                 Add NuGet feed URL
  --feed-auth <auth>           Feed authentication: feedName|username|pat
  --export-packages <path>     Export package results to file (format via --export-format)
  --export-warnings <path>     Export version warnings to a separate file
  --export-recommendations <path> Export update recommendations to a separate file
  --export-format <format>     Export format: Json or Csv (default: Json)
  --export-sbom <path>         Export SPDX 3.0.0 SBOM (Software Bill of Materials) as JSON-LD

Exclusion Options:
  --exclude-prefix <prefix>    Exclude packages starting with prefix (e.g., Microsoft.)
  --exclude-package <name>     Exclude specific package by exact name
  --exclude-pattern <regex>    Exclude packages matching regex pattern
  --exclude-project <pattern>  Exclude project files matching regex pattern (.csproj, .vbproj, .fsproj)
  --exclude-repo <pattern>     Exclude repositories matching regex pattern (e.g., "Legacy-.*")
  --include-repo <pattern>     Include only repositories matching regex pattern (repeatable, processed in order)
  --no-default-exclusions      Don't exclude Microsoft.* and System.* by default
  --case-sensitive             Use case-sensitive package name matching
  --case-sensitive-project     Use case-sensitive project file matching

Update Options:
  --update-references          Enable auto-update mode (creates branches and PRs)
  --dry-run                    Show planned updates without creating branches/PRs
  --update-scope <scope>       Version update scope: Patch, Minor, or Major (default: Patch)
  --source-branch <pattern>    Source branch pattern to branch from (default: same as target-branch)
  --target-branch <pattern>    Target branch pattern for PRs (default: develop/*)
  --feature-branch <name>      Feature branch name prefix (default: feature/update-nuget-references)
  --source-packages-only       Only update packages that have source code in scanned repositories
  --required-reviewer <email>  Add a required PR reviewer (repeatable, must approve)
  --optional-reviewer <email>  Add an optional PR reviewer (repeatable, notified only)
  --tag-commits                Create a lightweight git tag on the feature branch commit
  --no-incremental-prs         Skip repos that already have open NuGroom PRs (exit with warning)
  --ignore-renovate            Skip reading renovate.json from repositories

Version Increment Options (applied to projects with updated references):
  --increment-project-version [scope]          Increment <Version> (Patch, Minor, or Major; default: Patch)
  --increment-project-assemblyversion [scope]  Increment <AssemblyVersion>
  --increment-project-fileversion [scope]      Increment <FileVersion>
  --increment-project-version-all [scope]      Increment all three version properties

Sync Options:
  --sync <package> [version]   Sync a specific package to a version across all repos (creates PRs)
                               If version is omitted, the latest available version is used
                               Repeatable: specify multiple --sync flags to sync several packages

CPM Migration Options:
  --migrate-to-cpm             Migrate projects to use Central Package Management (Directory.Packages.props)
  --per-project                Create a Directory.Packages.props per project instead of per repository
                               (only valid with --migrate-to-cpm)

For detailed help, see README.md
